Explore Email Marketing

Explore WhatsApp Messaging
Powerful SMS messaging
Build always-on campaigns that drive action, with personalized SMS messages that land in seconds.
Explore SMS Marketing
1,000+ app integrations
Connect your entire marketing stack. From CRM to ecommerce, social media to analytics—autonomous marketing works with the tools you already use.
Explore Integrations
Helping thousands of teams punch above their weight
I felt overwhelmed, but with the AI tools, that hesitant feeling completely went away.
ActiveCampaign has done such a good job of putting the right AI tools in front of us—things that we actually want and need.
ActiveCampaign’s AI tools have taken the guesswork out of email marketing. Now we don’t need external help, and we get better results.
We saw a 20% engagement rate growth over six months and we knew we were doing something right.
Between two emails we did over $76,000 in revenue, largely thanks to ActiveCampaign forms, tagging, and automation.
30-Day Guarantee
See results in 30 days or get your
money back
We’re so confident you’ll grow with us, we’ll give you a full refund if you’re not satisfied after 30 days.

We - and our partners - use cookies to deliver our services and to show you ads.
By using our website, you agree to the use of cookies as described in our
Cookie Policy (in English)
Accept
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Other
Other
Additional first-party and/or third-party cookies.

Memory that compounds every session
Active Intelligence remembers your rules so every session builds on the last instead of resetting to zero.
Watch video
Upload a doc, get a campaign
Drop in a brief, or reference a past campaign. Active Intelligence reads it, extracts key messages, and builds from what you already wrote, not from a generic template.
Watch video
Fix images without leaving the campaign
Hover any image, describe the change, and Active Intelligence generates a high quality version on the spot. Swap directly from your content library or pull from a URL, all without leaving the campaign editor.
Watch video
Small change, not a total rebuild
Keep what works in your past campaign describe what you need to change and everything else stays intact.
Watch video
Customize your AI experience
Set your company voice, audience details, and strategic priorities once—then Active Intelligence remembers them forever. Every campaign, automation, and recommendation automatically reflects your brand guidelines. Configure custom instructions in minutes and watch your AI suggestions become instantly more relevant.
Watch video
Active Intelligence connectors
Hyperpersonalize your campaigns with Connectors
Active Intelligence 2.8 builds campaigns from your brand, your templates, and your best-performing content, so the first draft already looks and sounds like you.  Connectors pull deeper context from across your tech stack–like Asana, Calendly, Google Ads, Stripe, Webflow and Wix to hyper-personalize your campaigns.
Learn how to set up the connectors
Contact import agent
Launch Campaigns Faster with Contact Import agent
Customers can upload a CSV or XLSX and let Active Intelligence handle the rest — mapping columns to existing fields, creating new custom fields where needed, and recommending lists and tags so contacts are campaign-ready on day one. No manual prep, no formatting errors
Learn more
Migration solution
Seamlessly Switch Platforms
The Migration Solution transforms the platform switching experience, working with our preferred partner and leveraging Active Intelligence to migrate your marketing assets from Mailchimp into ActiveCampaign, seamlessly and without the manual work.
Learn more
WhatsApp templates
Create WhatsApp templates more easily
Now, users can create and manage WhatsApp template messages directly in ActiveCampaign in a simpler way that aligns with Meta’s requirements. This makes it easier to build templates with a higher chance of approval and use them in campaigns and automations.
Learn more
Ready to take ActiveCampaign for a spin?
Try it free for 14 days.
Free 14-day trial with email sign-up
Email address
Get started
Join thousands of customers. No credit card needed. Instant setup.
Connect with all your favorite tools

We - and our partners - use cookies to deliver our services and to show you ads.
By using our website, you agree to the use of cookies as described in our
Cookie Policy (in English)
Accept
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Other
Other
Additional first-party and/or third-party cookies.

Integrate your entire tech stack with custom apps
Become an app partner
API documentation
Create or update a listing
We’re here to help
Help center
Help Docs
Get instructions, troubleshooting tips, and best practices to effectively use platform features to your advantage.
FAQs
Common questions about ActiveCampaign’s products, features, privacy, setup, billing, and account.
Request Help
Still stuck? Have more questions? Reach out to our support team and we’ll guide you through your issue.
Send Feedback
Share your thoughts, pain-points, suggestions, and ideas to help shape the future of ActiveCampaign.
Frequently asked questions
How can I use ActiveCampaign integrations to improve reporting and analytics?
ActiveCampaign works with tools like Google Sheets to make reporting faster and more flexible. You can automatically send contact, deal, or campaign data into a live spreadsheet to build custom reports, track performance, or blend data with other business metrics without needing manual exports. Combined with analytics tools like Looker Studio or BigQuery, you get full visibility into your marketing performance.
Do I need technical skills to set up integrations?
No coding required.
Most integrations connect in just a few clicks through our native connections or Zapier. Our
AI Campaign Builder
can even suggest which integrations to activate based on your business goals and existing tech stack. For Developers, we offer deeper API access, a low-code solution called
App Studio
, and webhook capabilities for custom client solutions.
Can I migrate my existing integrations from my current tool?
Yes. ActiveCampaign supports most major integrations available in competitors, plus many specialized tools that competitors don’t offer. Our onboarding specialists can help migrate your current automations, contact lists, and more to ActiveCampaign, often improving efficiency through our AI automation capabilities. Most customers find they can reduce their tech stack while gaining more powerful cross-channel orchestration.
How do integrations enable cross-channel marketing?
ActiveCampaign’s integrations allow you to
create a unified customer view where you can combine email marketing, SMS, website tracking, WhatsApp Messaging, and more
.
You can trigger automations based on actions within connected apps—like a purchase in Shopify, a support ticket in Zendesk, or a call log in Salesforce. These triggers can instantly launch cross-channel campaigns. This is autonomous marketing in action: your systems work together without manual intervention.
Example: When someone browses your connected Shopify or Wix store, our AI can automatically trigger a personalized email sequence, schedule an SMS follow-up, and adjust your Facebook ad targeting—all from a single workflow.
What’s the difference between native integrations and API access?
Our 1,000+ apps and integrations include many native integrations that work out of the box with pre-built features and require no development. The
ActiveCampaign API
provides unlimited flexibility for custom builds, allowing developers and agencies to create bespoke solutions for unique business needs. Both options leverage Active Intelligence to automate marketing decisions and execution across your connected tools.
Is it complicated or time-consuming to set up a new integration?
Not at all. We prioritize a frictionless setup so you can focus on building your campaigns, not troubleshooting connections. For hundreds of popular tools, the connection process is typically a simple
​
“
connect” button or copy-and-paste of an API key, allowing you to get up and running in minutes. You don’t need to be a developer to link critical apps like your CRM, e‑commerce platform, or lead generation tools.
What if I don’t see the specific, niche, or custom tool I use on the Apps page?
ActiveCampaign is designed to be the hub of your entire tech stack, even for unlisted or proprietary tools. You can use our comprehensive
Developer Tools
and
API documentation
to build your own custom connector. We also have a network of
Certified Consultants
available to help you build and implement integrations for unique systems, ensuring you can leverage ActiveCampaign’s power with any application your business relies on.
Ready to take ActiveCampaign for a spin?
Try it free for 14 days.
Free 14-day trial with email sign-up
Email address
Get started
Join thousands of customers. No credit card needed. Instant setup.

analysis.name: ActiveCampaign
analysis.tagline: Cut 13 hours of marketing busywork each week with autonomous marketing
analysis.value_proposition: Autonomous, AI-powered marketing automation platform that learns your brand and automates email, SMS, and WhatsApp campaigns across the customer journey.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growing SMB and mid-market marketing teams (ecommerce, SaaS, franchises, creators) that need multi-channel automation without an enterprise-scale budget

features.name: marketing automation
features.description: Visual automation builder for multi-step customer journeys across channels
features.evidence_quote: Automate and optimize customer journeys

features.name: email marketing
features.description: Personalized email campaigns and newsletters with AI-assisted creation
features.evidence_quote: Email marketing with 8x faster campaign creation

features.name: sms marketing
features.description: Automated personalized SMS campaigns tied to marketing automation
features.evidence_quote: SMS that works with your marketing automation

features.name: whatsapp messaging
features.description: Unified WhatsApp chat inbox with automation for two-way conversations
features.evidence_quote: A unified chat inbox with powerful automation

features.name: transactional email
features.description: Automated receipts, password resets and system emails
features.evidence_quote: Automate receipts, password resets, and more

features.name: crm
features.description: Built-in CRM with deal pipelines for nimble sales teams
features.evidence_quote: A CRM built for nimble teams

features.name: landing pages
features.description: Landing page builder for lead capture and campaigns
features.evidence_quote: Landing pages

features.name: segmentation
features.description: Contact segmentation with tiered depth (limited/standard/advanced/premium)
features.evidence_quote: Premium segmentation / Advanced segmentation / Standard / Limited

features.name: active intelligence ai
features.description: Autonomous AI assistant that drafts campaigns from brand context
features.evidence_quote: Autonomous AI features for better and faster work

features.name: ai memory
features.description: Persistent AI memory across sessions so workflows build on prior work
features.evidence_quote: Memory that compounds every session

features.name: custom instructions
features.description: Set brand voice, audience and priorities once for reuse across AI
features.evidence_quote: Set your rules once. Every campaign follows them automatically.

features.name: brand kit
features.description: Store voice, logo, colors and images so AI drafts stay on-brand
features.evidence_quote: Every draft is unmistakably yours: your voice, logo, colors, and images

features.name: campaign reference
features.description: AI builds new campaigns from your best-performing past emails
features.evidence_quote: Build from your best-performing emails, not a blank page

features.name: ai image editing
features.description: In-editor AI image generation and edits from natural-language prompts
features.evidence_quote: Hover any image, describe the change, and Active Intelligence generates a high quality version

features.name: active intelligence connectors
features.description: Pulls context from Asana, Calendly, Google Ads, Stripe, Webflow, Wix into AI
features.evidence_quote: Connectors pull deeper context from across your tech stack

features.name: contact import agent
features.description: AI-powered CSV/XLSX import with auto field mapping and list/tag suggestions
features.evidence_quote: upload a CSV or XLSX and let Active Intelligence handle the rest

features.name: whatsapp templates
features.description: Create and manage Meta-compliant WhatsApp templates in-app
features.evidence_quote: users can create and manage WhatsApp template messages directly in ActiveCampaign

features.name: migration solution
features.description: Assisted migration from Mailchimp using AI and partner services
features.evidence_quote: migrate your marketing assets from Mailchimp into ActiveCampaign

features.name: predictive sending
features.description: Sends emails at optimal per-contact time
features.evidence_quote: Predictive sending

features.name: conditional content
features.description: Dynamic email content that varies by contact attributes
features.evidence_quote: Predictive & conditional content

features.name: attribution tracking
features.description: Attribution and conversion tracking across campaigns
features.evidence_quote: Attribution & conversion tracking

features.name: custom objects
features.description: Custom data objects for modeling non-contact records
features.evidence_quote: Custom objects

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on for account access
features.evidence_quote: Single Sign-On (SSO)

features.name: business goals
features.description: Track active marketing goals with tiered active-goal caps
features.evidence_quote: 200 active goals / 25 active goals / 15 active goals

features.name: cross-channel marketing
features.description: Coordinate campaigns across email, SMS and WhatsApp
features.evidence_quote: Cross-channel marketing

features.name: generative ai content creation
features.description: AI generation of campaign copy and content
features.evidence_quote: Generative AI

features.name: enhanced crm add-on
features.description: Optional pipelines and sales engagement CRM upgrade
features.evidence_quote: Boost our CRM with two add-ons: Pipelines and sales engagement

features.name: forms
features.description: Signup forms with double opt-in support
features.evidence_quote: How to enable double opt-in for your ActiveCampaign form

features.name: site tracking
features.description: Track contact activity on your website for automation triggers
features.evidence_quote: Site Tracking is a powerful feature that connects your marketing and sales processes to your website activity

features.name: browse abandonment automation
features.description: Trigger campaigns when contacts browse but don't buy
features.evidence_quote: Introducing Browse Abandonment!

features.name: custom reports
features.description: Detailed customizable reporting dashboards
features.evidence_quote: Intro to Custom Reports

features.name: analytics and reporting
features.description: Standard campaign and automation analytics
features.evidence_quote: Analytics & Reporting

features.name: ecommerce integrations
features.description: Deep integrations with Shopify, WooCommerce, Square, etc.
features.evidence_quote: Standard CRM & ecommerce integrations

features.name: api
features.description: Public REST API for custom integrations
features.evidence_quote: The ActiveCampaign API is used to enable integrations

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS/Android app for managing contacts, tasks and deals
features.evidence_quote: The ActiveCampaign mobile app makes it easy for you to view and manage contact information

features.name: activecampaign hq
features.description: Multi-location/franchise brand consistency and local personalization
features.evidence_quote: helps multi-location brands and franchises deliver consistent experiences at scale

features.name: security checklist
features.description: Built-in account security posture checklist
features.evidence_quote: a Security Checklist that you can use to see how protected your account is

features.name: claude and chatgpt connectors
features.description: Direct connections to Claude and ChatGPT for AI-driven ops
features.evidence_quote: Connect to Claude and ChatGPT

features.name: 1000+ integrations
features.description: Marketplace of 1,018 apps and integrations
features.evidence_quote: Showing 1–30 of 1,018 Apps & Integrations

differentiators: Autonomous AI (Active Intelligence) with brand memory across sessions
Cuts ~13 hours of marketing busywork per week
Deep multi-channel automation combining email + SMS + WhatsApp
Franchise/multi-location HQ product for brand consistency at scale

praised: 'I felt overwhelmed, but with the AI tools, that hesitant feeling completely went away.'
'ActiveCampaign's AI tools have taken the guesswork out of email marketing.'
'20% engagement rate growth over six months'
'Between two emails we did over $76,000 in revenue, largely thanks to ActiveCampaign forms, tagging, and automation.'

free_tier.limits: 14-day free trial, no credit card required

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Email marketing, limited AI + segmentation, 5 actions per automation, 1 user

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: Standard segmentation, unlimited automation actions, landing pages, 1 user

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced segmentation, predictive/conditional content, attribution, 3 users

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Premium segmentation, custom objects, SSO, dedicated account team, 5 users

pricing.notes: Prices scale with email contact tier (1K-200K+) and separate WhatsApp contact tier; billed annually; add-ons for enhanced CRM (pipelines, sales engagement); 30-day money-back guarantee
